description: Fetched body's $ref points at an arbitrary cross-origin URI (not same-origin, not AAO mirror, not intra-document). SDK MUST reject the reference and treat the parent schema as unresolvable.
rationale: Cross-origin $ref is a free SSRF primitive once inside the schema body. Sandboxing requires: same-origin (after RFC 3986 §6 normalization), AAO mirror namespace, or intra-document #/... JSON Pointer only. $ref: file://... MUST be rejected unconditionally.
